title: chore(deps): update dependency eslint-plugin-jasmine to v4
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|---|
| [eslint-plugin-jasmine](https://togithub.com/tlvince/eslint-plugin-jasmine) | devDependencies | major | [`2.10.1` -> `4.1.0`](https://renovatebot.com/diffs/npm/eslint-plugin-jasmine/2.10.1/4.1.0) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>tlvince/eslint-plugin-jasmine</summary>

### [`v4.1.0`](https://togithub.com/tlvince/eslint-plugin-jasmine/releases/v4.1.0)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/tlvince/eslint-plugin-jasmine/compare/v4.0.0...v4.1.0)

##### Features

-   **no-pending-tests:** add rule to disallow pending specs ([ab30e3e](https://togithub.com/tlvince/eslint-plugin-jasmine/commit/ab30e3ed2f0ac39f2054a84b5c162500c1abb7cd))

### [`v4.0.0`](https://togithub.com/tlvince/eslint-plugin-jasmine/releases/v4.0.0)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/tlvince/eslint-plugin-jasmine/compare/v3.0.0...v4.0.0)

##### chore

-   **repo:** bump deps ([d7aa95d](https://togithub.com/tlvince/eslint-plugin-jasmine/commit/d7aa95de5f403727e3b4fdeddbb588312ef596f1))

##### BREAKING CHANGES

-   **repo:** upgrades eslint from v4.x to 6.x

### [`v3.0.0`](https://togithub.com/tlvince/eslint-plugin-jasmine/releases/v3.0.0)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/tlvince/eslint-plugin-jasmine/compare/v2.10.1...v3.0.0)

##### chore

-   **package:** drop support for Node.js older than v8 ([39c40ce](https://togithub.com/tlvince/eslint-plugin-jasmine/commit/39c40cef1a8e4943d4cc633cc835f8a2b3a09d38))
-   **travis:** drop support for node v4 ([f42039e](https://togithub.com/tlvince/eslint-plugin-jasmine/commit/f42039e6c440daa8b6ad8a85c9fccb379039c55a))

##### Features

-   **missing-expect:** add `expectAsync()` support ([45e2abd](https://togithub.com/tlvince/eslint-plugin-jasmine/commit/45e2abd4a26f7407930dd8cae8c40df2c160c48f))
-   **no-expect-in-setup-teardown:** add `expectAsync()` support ([2eea06b](https://togithub.com/tlvince/eslint-plugin-jasmine/commit/2eea06b7804bd3821522a320a79ae39523dffa5e))
-   **prefer-toBeUndefined:** add rule to prefer toBeUndefined matcher ([4604189](https://togithub.com/tlvince/eslint-plugin-jasmine/commit/46041894ea7b2b249f3384dc1f0c034de0b0a421))

##### BREAKING CHANGES

-   **package:** this package no longer supports Node.js versions older than v8.
-   **travis:** After this release, node v4.x is not guaranteed to
    be compatible with this package.

</details>
